text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daitaku Helios faints from overexertion. She is
built to run miles, so training for medium-distance
races places a great burden on her body.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite that, Daitaku Helios staunchly swears to
run the autumn Tenno Sho to see her bestie's
triumphant victory from right beside her.
